text: SOS in Mangalore, homes near the river are flooded and people are stranded on rooftops.
title: Urgent SOS: Flooding in Mangalore River Area

text: Heavy rain in Udupi causing waterlogging and road blocked near the bus stand.
title: Heavy Rain Blocks Roads in Udupi Bus Stand

text: Cyclone warning issued for Coastal Karnataka, evacuate low lying areas in Mangaluru.
title: Cyclone Warning: Evacuate Low-Lying Areas in Mangaluru

text: Light rain in Mangalore this morning, minor puddles but no major issues.
title: Light Rain in Mangalore, Minor Disruptions

text: Fire reported in a warehouse on the outskirts of Udupi, emergency services on site.
title: Warehouse Fire in Udupi Outskirts

text: Residents in Mangaluru say they are trapped due to sudden landslide near the highway.

text: Minor tremor felt in Udupi district, no damage reported yet.

text: Rescue teams dispatched as families are stranded near Mangalore river banks.

text: Road blocked in Udupi after heavy rain last night.

text: Coastal Karnataka on alert as cyclone winds intensify, evacuate coastal homes.

text: Emergency services report stranded boats near Mangalore harbor after rough sea.

text: Waterlogging near Udupi railway station, buses diverted.

text: Evacuation underway in Mangaluru coastal wards, storm surge risk high.

text: Heavy winds reported in Udupi, trees fallen on roads.

text: Flood waters rising in Mangalore river, residents advised to move to higher ground.

text: Power outage in Udupi due to heavy rain, restoration in progress.
